Part.Source:
&tmpNFeCod = trim(str(&EmpCod)) + trim(Str(&FilCod)) + trim(str(&PedCod))
For Each Order tmpNFeCod where tmpNFeCod = &tmpNFeCod
For Each Order tmpNFeCod, tmpNfeItmCod //PRODUTO For Each Order tmpNFeCod, tmpNfeItmCod, tmpProLotCod //LOTE delete EndFor delete EndFor delete EndFor
commit
RetornaConfSistema.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCod, domConfSistema.TCon180_AgrupaGrade, &TCon180_AgrupaGrade)
PedFatFilCod_IsEditaPedido.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCod, &PedCod, &IsEditaFilFatFiLCod, &MensagemFilFatFilCod) RetornaFilialFaturamentoPedido.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCod, &PedCod, &FatFilCod)
&FilBasImp = RetornaFilialBaseImposto.Udp(&EmpCod, &FatFilCod)
For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where FilCod = &FatFilCod &FilPerFun = FilPerFun &FilCrdIcm = FilCrdIcm
&FilCidUfeCod = FilCidUfeCod Exit EndFor
//PARA RATEIO //FRETE For each Order EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod, (PedItmCod) Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where FilCod = &FilCod Where PedCod = &PedCod Where ProTipDef <> Definicao.SERVICO Where PedQtd > 0
&UltimoPedItmCod = PedItmCod
Exit EndFor
For each Order EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where FilCod = &FilCod Where PedCod = &PedCod
&NfeIndPres = '1' //Operacao presencial PDV
RetornaMarketplacePedido.Call(EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod, &sdtDadosNota) &TotalNotaFreteMoeda = PedVlrBrt - (PedVlrOut + PedVlrFrt + PedVlrGnre) - PedVlrDscGlb
&LctDesFun = LctDesFun &LctPerCred = LctPerCred &LctBasImpCod = LctBasImpCod
if &ModCod = '65' //NOTA 65 VENDA PRESENCIAL &PedCliCidUfeCod = &FilCidUfeCod Else If not PedPrpCidUfeCod.IsEmpty() &PedCliCidUfeCod = PedPrpCidUfeCod Else &PedCliCidUfeCod = PedCliCidUfeCod EndIf Endif
&PedCliGruImpCod = PedCliGruImpCod &LctTip = LctTip &PedNum = PedNum &PedTpcVlr = PedTpcVlr
&PedVlrOut = PedVlrOut
&tmpNfeVlrFrt = PedVlrFrt
&tmpNfePesLiq = PedPesTotPro &tmpNfePesBrt = PedPesTotPro if PedPesTot <> 0 &tmpNfePesLiq = PedPesTot &tmpNfePesBrt = PedPesTot EndIF
&valorGlobalFrete = 0 if &tmpNfeVlrFrt > 0 and &TotalNotaFreteMoeda > 0 //RATEIO //FRETE &valorGlobalFrete = &tmpNfeVlrFrt/&TotalNotaFreteMoeda Endif
New tmpNFeCod = &tmpNFeCod tmpNfeDtaMod = serverdate() tmpNfeEnvEml = true //PADRAO SEM ENVIAR tmpEmpCod = &EmpCod tmpFilCod = &FilCod tmpPedCod = &PedCod tmpPedVlrBrt = PedVlrBrt tmpNfeDtaEms = PedDtaEms tmpNfeDtaDsp = PedDtaEms tmpNfeFatFilCod = &FatFilCod tmpNfePesLiq = &tmpNfePesLiq tmpNfePesBrt = &tmpNfePesBrt tmpMarDesMar = true //&tmpMarDesMar tmpNfeDesImp = true //&tmpNfeDesImp tmpNfeVlrFrt = &tmpNfeVlrFrt tmpTipDesc = 'P' &tmpTipDesc = 'P'
tmpNfeIndPres = &NfeIndPres tmpMrkCnpj = &sdtDadosNota.InterCnpj tmpMrkUser = &sdtDadosNota.MrkSellUser
tmpNfeFin = NotaFinalidade.EmissaoNormal
if &LctTip = TipoLancamento.DevolucaoCompra or &LctTip = TipoLancamento.DevolucaoVenda tmpNfeFin = NotaFinalidade.EmissaoDevolucao if PedCodOciRef > 0 and PedNfeChvRef.IsEmpty() // tmpNfeChvRef.IsEmpty() &PedfilCodOciRef = PedFilCodOciRef if &PedfilCodOciRef.IsEmpty() &PedfilCodOciRef = 1 EndIF
localizaChaveNotaFiscalPedidoDevolvido.Call(EmpCod, &PedfilCodOciRef, PedCodOciRef, &NfeChv) if not &NfeChv.IsEmpty() tmpNfeChvRef = &NfeChv EndIf Else tmpNfeChvRef = PedNfeChvRef Endif EndIf &tmpNfeFin = tmpNfeFin tmpNfePerDsc = 0 &tmpNfePerDsc = 0
if not PedNovCliCpfCnpj.IsEmpty() and Not PedNovCliCpfCnpj.IsNull() and Not PedNovCliRaz.IsEmpty() and Not PedNovCliRaz.IsNull() and not PedNovTip.IsEmpty() and Not PedNovTip.IsNull()
tmpPedCliNom = PedNovCliRaz tmpPedCliCpf = PedNovCliCpfCnpj tmpPedCliCnpj = PedNovCliCpfCnpj tmpPedCliTip = PedNovTip Else If PedCliNfeCod <> 0 and PedCliNfeCod <> PedCliCod tmpPedCliNom = PedCliNfeNom tmpPedCliCpf = PedCliNfeCpf tmpPedCliCnpj = PedCliNfeCnpj tmpPedCliTip = PedCliNfeTip Else tmpPedCliNom = PedCliRaz tmpPedCliCpf = PedCliCpf tmpPedCliCnpj = PedCliCnpj tmpPedCliTip = PedCliTip EndIf EndIF
tmpNfeVlrDsc = 0 &tmpNfeVlrDsc = 0
If PedVlrDscGlb > 0 tmpTipDesc = 'V' &tmpTipDesc = 'V'
tmpNfeVlrDsc = PedVlrDscGlb &tmpNfeVlrDsc = PedVlrDscGlb EndIF EndNew
commit
&DescontoUnitarioGlobal = 0 if &tmpNfeVlrDsc > 0 and PedVlrBrt > 0 &DescontoUnitarioGlobal = (&tmpNfeVlrDsc/PedVlrBrt ) * 100 Endif
If &TCon180_AgrupaGrade <> 'S' or &LctTip = TipoLancamento.DevolucaoCompra or &LctTip = TipoLancamento.EntradaMercadoria
For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod Where ProTipDef <> Definicao.SERVICO Where PedQtd > 0 //Where PedVlrItm > 0 when TRIM(&TCon129_TotalProdutozerado) = 'S' // NÃO levar produtos com Vlr Tot zerado do pedido para nota &ImpCatCod = ProCatCod
&Mensagem = '' &ProBar = '' &Varchar = Substr(trim(ProGraBar), 1, 3) if &Varchar <> '333' and not &Varchar.IsEmpty() ValidaEAN13.Call(ProCod, ProGraBar, &ProBar, &Mensagem) Else &ProBar = '' &Mensagem = 'Invalido' EndiF &tmpProCod = ProCod New tmpNFeCod = &tmpNFeCod tmpNfeItmCod = PedItmCod
&PedItmCod = PedItmCod
tmpProCod = ProCod tmpProGraCod = ProGraCod tmpProRef = ProGraRef
tmpPedItmProRefDig = PedItmProRefDig
&NomeProduto = '' if ProNomNF.IsEmpty() or ProNomNF.IsNull() &NomeProduto = ProNomGra.Trim() + ' ' + trim(PedItmCmp) Else &NomeProduto = ProNomNF.Trim() + ' ' + trim(PedItmCmp) Endif &NomeProduto = &NomeProduto.Trim() If not PedItmProRefDig.IsEmpty() and not PedItmProRefDig.IsNull() and PedItmProRefDig <> ProGraRef &NomeProduto += ' (' + trim(PedItmProRefDig) + ')' Endif tmpProNom = &NomeProduto
tmpProOriRef = &tmpProOriRef tmpProOriNom = &tmpProOriNom
tmpNfeProBar = '' if &Mensagem.IsEmpty() tmpNfeProBar = &ProBar Else tmpNfeProBar = '' EndIF tmpProCatCod = ProCatCod TmpProRctPen = ProStsRag //Receituario
tmpNfeProDadAdi = '' //if ProSolLot = SolicitarLote.SIM_CONTROLAR and PedItmCmpLot <> 'LOTE_NAO_INFORMADO' // tmpNfeProDadAdi += PedItmCmpLot.Trim() //Endif tmpNfeProDadAdi += ' ' + trim(ProDetNfe) tmpNfeProDadAdi = tmpNfeProDadAdi.Trim()
tmpNcmCod = NcmCod tmpNcmCEST = trim(str(ProNcmCest)) tmpUnd = ProEmbUnd tmpMarCodNom = MarNom
//PedQtd = &PedQtd //QTD TOTAL //PedQtdEmb = &PedQtdEmb //QUANTIDADE //PedProEmbQtd = &PedProEmbQtd //MULTIPLO
if &LctTip = TipoLancamento.DevolucaoCompra or &LctTip = TipoLancamento.EntradaMercadoria //DEVOLUCAO COMPRA, OU NOTA PROPRIA PARA COMPRA MERCADORIAS tmpPedVlrUnt = PedVlrUnt //PedVlrUntDsc &PedVlrUntDsc = PedVlrUnt &PedQtd = PedQtdEmb Else &PedQtd = PedQtd tmpPedVlrUnt = PedVlrUntComDsc_FORMULA //PedVlrUntDsc &PedVlrUntDsc = PedVlrUntComDsc_FORMULA //PedVlrUntDsc Endif tmpPedQtd = &PedQtd
tmpPedQtdFat = &PedQtd
do 'CalculaValorUnitarioTotal'
&AuxtmpPedVlrDsc = round(tmpPedQtdFat * &tmpPedVlrDsc, 2) //DESCONTO tmpPedVlrDsc = &AuxtmpPedVlrDsc
tmpPedVlrTot = PedVlrItm
tmpPedVlrUntNov = &tmpPedVlrUntNov tmpPedVlrTotNov = ROUND(tmpPedQtdFat * &tmpPedVlrUntNov, 2) &tmpPedVlrTotNov= ROUND(tmpPedQtdFat * &tmpPedVlrUntNov, 2)
do 'tabImposto' if &LctTip = TipoLancamento.DevolucaoCompra//DEVOLUCAO COMPRA //&SitCod = SitCod //&ImpCfoCod = ImpCfoCod //&ImpAlqMVA = ImpAlqMVA &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpAlqIcmInt = PedItmIcm //ICMS //&sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpRedAlqIcmInt = ImpRedAlqIcmInt &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpAlqIcmExt = PedItmIcmSt //ICMS S.T //&sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpRedAlqIcmExt = ImpRedAlqIcmExt //&sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpDif = ImpDif //&sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpCofins = ImpCofins //&sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CNfeCstCofins = ImpCstCofins //&sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpPis = ImpPis //&sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CtmpNfeCstPIS = ImpCstPis //&sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CtmpNfeCstIpi = ImpCstIpi &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpIPI = PedItmIpi //IPI //&sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CtmpCBenef = ImpCBenef Endif
tmpCBenef = &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpCBenef tmpImpALqIcmUFDest = &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpALqIcmUFDest
tmpNfeSitCod = &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CIMpCstCod tmpNfeOriCod = ProOriTriCod
tmpCFOP = &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpCfoCod
if &sdtCadastrotabelaImpostoCbs.CImpCstCod in (domSituacaoTributariaVarchar.CST02,domSituacaoTributariaVarchar.CST15, domSituacaoTributariaVarchar.CST53, domSituacaoTributariaVarchar.cst61) if ProPesLiq > 0 tmpPedQtdTrib = ProPesLiq Else tmpPedQtdTrib = ProPesLiqCal EndIf
&tmpProBasVlrIcm = ROUND(tmpPedQtdTrib * tmpPedQtdFat, 2) Else &tmpProBasVlrIcm = ROUND(tmpPedQtdFat * &tmpPedVlrUntNov, 2) Endif
&sdtImpostoProduto = new() &sdtImpostoProduto.ProBasVlrIcm = &tmpProBasVlrIcm &sdtImpostoProduto.ProBasVlrIcmSt = &tmpProBasVlrIcm &sdtImpostoProduto.ProBasVlrIpi = &tmpProBasVlrIcm &sdtImpostoProduto.ProBasPis = &tmpProBasVlrIcm &sdtImpostoProduto.ProBasCofins = &tmpProBasVlrIcm &sdtImpostoProduto.ValorTotalProduto = &tmpProBasVlrIcm // TOTAL PRODUTO
tmpNfeMotDesIcms = &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpIcmsMotDes //#ICMS #ICMS ST #IPI #PIS #COFINS do 'CalculaRateioFrete' CalculaImposto_IBSCBS.Call(&sdtCadastrotabelaImpostoCbs, &sdtImpostoProduto) //Calcula impostos
tmpProVlrFrt = &tmpProVlrFrt
if not &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpIcmsMotDes.IsEmpty() tmpProBasVlrIcm = 0//BASE ALIQ ICMS tmpProPerRedIcm = 0//RED.ALIQ ICMS tmpProPerIcm = 0//ALIQ. ICMS tmpProVlrIcm = 0//R$ ICMS tmpProVlrIcmsDes = &sdtImpostoProduto.ProVlrIcm Else tmpProBasVlrIcm = &sdtImpostoProduto.ProBasVlrIcm //BASE ALIQ ICMS tmpProPerRedIcm = &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpRedAlqIcmInt //RED.ALIQ ICMS tmpProPerIcm = &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpAlqIcmInt //ALIQ. ICMS tmpProVlrIcm = &sdtImpostoProduto.ProVlrIcm //R$ ICMS tmpProVlrIcmsDes = 0 Endif
tmpProBasVlrIcmSt = &sdtImpostoProduto.ProBasVlrIcmSt //BASE ALIQ. ICMS S.T tmpProPerRedIcmSt = &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpRedAlqIcmExt tmpProPerIcmSt = &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpAlqIcmExt //% ICMS S.T tmpProVlrIcmSt = &sdtImpostoProduto.ProVlrIcmSt //R$ ICMS S.T
//DIFERIMENTO tmpProPerDif = &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpDif tmpProVlrDif = &sdtImpostoProduto.ProVlrDif
//FECOP tmpProBasFCPIcmsSt = &sdtImpostoProduto.ProBasFCPIcmsSt tmpProTaxFCPIcmsSt = &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpTaxFecop tmpProVlrFCPIcmsSt = &sdtImpostoProduto.ProVlrFCPIcmsSt
tmpNfeProTaxMvaSt = &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpAlqMVA
tmpNfeProCodAnp = ProCodAnp tmpNfeProDscAnp = ProDscAnp tmpNfeProPerGlp = ProPerGlp tmpNfeProPerGni = ProPerGni tmpNfeProPerGnn = ProPerGnn tmpNfeProVlrPar = ProVlrPar
//RETIDO tmpNfeProTaxIcmsRet = 0 tmpNfeProVlrIcmsRet = 0 tmpNfeProBasIcmsRet = 0 if &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpIcmsRet = 'S' and (&sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpCstCod = domSituacaoTributariaVarchar.CSOSN500 or &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpCstCod = domSituacaoTributariaVarchar.CST60) If (not ProTaxIcmsRet.IsEmpty() and not ProTaxIcmsRet.IsNull() and not ProBasIcmsRet.IsEmpty() and not ProBasIcmsRet.IsNull() and not ProVlrIcmsRet.IsEmpty() and not ProVlrIcmsRet.IsNull())
if ProVlrIcmsRet >= &tmpPedVlrUntNov //CASO VALOR SEJA MAIOR QUE O VALOR DA NOTA if &tmpPedVlrUntNov > 0 and &PedQtd > 0 and ProTaxIcmsRet > 0 &tmpNfeProBasIcmsRet = round(&tmpPedVlrUntNov/2,2) * &PedQtd tmpNfeProBasIcmsRet = &tmpNfeProBasIcmsRet tmpNfeProTaxIcmsRet = ProTaxIcmsRet tmpNfeProVlrIcmsRet = (&tmpNfeProBasIcmsRet*(ProTaxIcmsRet/100)) Endif Else tmpNfeProTaxIcmsRet = ProTaxIcmsRet tmpNfeProVlrIcmsRet = ProVlrIcmsRet * &PedQtd tmpNfeProBasIcmsRet = ProBasIcmsRet * &PedQtd Endif Else if &tmpPedVlrUntNov > 0 and &PedQtd > 0 //and ProTaxIcmsRet > 0 //JDF COLOQUEI DADOS ALEATORIOS PARA PARAR O ERRO DO 500 e 60, CONFORME IR IMPORTANDO AS NOTAS. PROBLEMA SERA RESOLVIDO &tmpNfeProBasIcmsRet = round(&tmpPedVlrUntNov/2,2) * &PedQtd tmpNfeProBasIcmsRet = &tmpNfeProBasIcmsRet tmpNfeProTaxIcmsRet = 19 tmpNfeProVlrIcmsRet = (&tmpNfeProBasIcmsRet * 0.19) Endif Endif Endif
tmpProBasVlrIpi = &sdtImpostoProduto.ProBasVlrIpi //BASE IPI tmpProPerIpi = &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpIPI //% IPI tmpProVlrIpi = &sdtImpostoProduto.ProVlrIpi //R$ IPI
&Numeric = val(&sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpCstIpi) &Varchar = Substr(&sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpCfoCod, 1, 1) Do Case Case &Varchar in ('5','6','7') and &Numeric < 50 tmpNfeCstIpi = '99'
Case &Varchar in ('1','2','3') and &Numeric >= 50 tmpNfeCstIpi = '49'
otherwise tmpNfeCstIpi = &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpCstIpi Endcase tmpNfeIpiEnq = &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpIpiEnq
tmpProBasPIS = &sdtImpostoProduto.ProBasPIS tmpProPerRedPis = &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpPisRed tmpProPerPIS = &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpPis //% PIS tmpProVlrPIS = &sdtImpostoProduto.ProVlrPIS //R$ PIS tmpNfeCstPIS = &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CIMpCstPISCofins //&CST='01'
tmpProBasCofins = &sdtImpostoProduto.ProBasCofins tmpProPerRedCofins = &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpCofinsRed tmpProPerCOFINS = &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpCofins //% COFINS tmpProVlrCOFINS = &sdtImpostoProduto.ProVlrCOFINS //R$ COFINS tmpNfeCstCofins = &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.NfeCstCofins //&CST='01'
//IBS E CBS tmpNfeIbsSit = &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpClsCST tmpNfeIbsClassTrib = &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpClsTrib tmpNfeIbsBas = &sdtImpostoProduto.ValorBaseIbsCbs
//Retido tmpNfeRegIbsSit = &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.NfeRegIbsSit tmpNfeRegIbsClassTrib = &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.NfeRegIbsClassTrib
tmpNfeRegIbsUfeTaxEfe = &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.NfeRegIbsUfeTaxEfe tmpNfeRegIbsUfeVlr = &sdtImpostoProduto.NfeRegIbsUfeVlr tmpNfeRegIbsMunTaxEfe = &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.NfeRegIbsMunTaxEfe tmpNfeRegIbsMunVlr = &sdtImpostoProduto.NfeRegIbsMunVlr tmpNfeRegCbsTaxEfe = &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.NfeRegCbsTaxEfe tmpNfeRegCbsVlr = &sdtImpostoProduto.NfeRegCbsVlr
tmpNfeIbsUfPer = &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.IbsUfTax tmpNfeIbsUfPerRed = &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CltClsRedIbs tmpNfeIbsUfPerEfe = &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.IbsUfTaxEfe tmpNfeIbsUfVlr = &sdtImpostoProduto.ValorIbsUf
tmpNfeIbsMunPer = &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.IbsMunTax tmpNfeIbsMunPerRed = &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CltClsRedIbs tmpNfeIbsMunVlr = &sdtImpostoProduto.ValorIbsMun tmpNfeIbsMunEfe = &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.IbsMunTaxEfe
tmpNfeCbsPer = &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.IbsUnTax tmpNfeCbsPerRed = &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CltClsRedCbs tmpNfeCbsPerEfe = &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.IbsUnTaxEfe tmpNfeCbsVlr = &sdtImpostoProduto.ValorCbs
//diferido tmpNfeIbsUfPerDif = &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.NfeIbsUfPerDif tmpNfeIbsUfVlrDif = &sdtImpostoProduto.NfeIbsUfVlrDif tmpNfeIbsMunPerDif = &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.NfeIbsMunPerDif tmpNfeIbsMunVlrDif = &sdtImpostoProduto.NfeIbsMunVlrDif tmpNfeCbsPerDif = &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.NfeCbsPerDif tmpNfeCbsVlrDif = &sdtImpostoProduto.NfeCbsVlrDif
&NcmCod = NcmCod
do 'CalucloImpostoAproximado' tmpProVlrApxImp = &tmpProVlrApxImp EndNew
For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod, PedItmCod, PedProEstLotCod New tmpProLotCod = PedProEstLotCod tmpProLotFab = PedProEstLotFab tmpProLotVct = PedProEstLotVct tmpProLotQtd = PedProEstLotQtd tmpProLotGer = PedProEstLotGer tmpProLotPen = PedProEstLotPen tmpProLotRen = PedProEstLotRen tmpProLotPms = PedProEstLotPms tmpProLotPur = PedProEstLotPur EndNew EndFor
EndFor Else GravaNotaTemporariaVendaGradeAgrupada.call(&EmpCod,&FilCod,&PedCod,&tmpNFeCod,&LctTip,&FilBasImp,&LctBasImpCod,&PedCliCidUfeCod,&PedCliGruImpCod,&DescontoUnitarioGlobal) EndIf
&PedObsNfe = PedObsNfe &PedCliObsNfe = PedCliObsNfe EndFor
commit
For Each Order tmpNFeCod Where tmpNFeCod = &tmpNFeCod
tmpTotPro += tmpPedVlrTotNov tmpTotBasIcm += tmpProBasVlrIcm tmpTotVlrIcm += tmpProVlrIcm tmpTotBasSt += tmpProBasVlrIcmSt tmpVlrSt += tmpProVlrIcmSt tmpTotFrt = &tmpNfeVlrFrt tmpTotSeg = 0 tmpTotOut = &PedVlrOut
&tmpTotVlrFcp += tmpProVlrFCPIcmsSt tmpTotDsc = 0 //DESCONTO EM VALORES R$ tmpTotDsc = &tmpNfeVlrDsc
//Calcula Funrural If &FilPerFun > 0 &tmpTotFun = (tmpTotPro * (&FilPerFun/100)) If &LctDesFun = Status_simNao.Sim and &tmpTotFun > 0 // Se Destacar vai somar nos descontos para/descontar do valor total da nota. tmpTotDsc += &tmpTotFun EndIf EndIf
tmpTotFun = &tmpTotFun
tmpTotPed = 0 tmpTotIpi += tmpProVlrIpi
//TOTAL NOTA tmpTotNFe = round((tmpTotPro + tmpVlrSt + tmpTotIpi + tmpTotPed + tmpTotSeg + tmpTotOut + tmpTotFrt + &tmpTotVlrFcp) - tmpTotDsc, 2) EndFor
commit
For Each Order tmpNFeCod Where tmpNFeCod = &tmpNFeCod
if not tmpTotApxImp.IsEmpty() &Percentual = round((tmpTotApxImp / tmpTotPro) * 100,2) &impostoAproximado = 'LEI 12.741/12, VALOR APROX.TRIB:R$' + trim(toformattedString(tmpTotApxImp)) + ' (' + trim(ToformattedString(&Percentual)) + '%)' RetornaConfSistema.Call(tmpEmpCod, tmpFilCod, domConfSistema.TCon084_ImpostoAproximado, &TCon084_ImpostoAproximado) If &TCon084_ImpostoAproximado = 'S' &impostoAproximado += ' FONTE:IBPT' Else &impostoAproximado += ' FONTE:SIMPLES NACIONAL' EndIf EndIF
If &FilCrdIcm <> 0 AND &LctPerCred = Status_SimNao.Sim RetornaAlgumProdutoCom101_temporaria.Call(&tmpNFeCod, &FilCrdIcm, &ValorCredito)
if &ValorCredito > 0 &tmpAutNfeDadAdi = ' PERMITE O APROVEITAMENTO DO CREDITO DE ICMS NO VALOR DE R$' &tmpAutNfeDadAdi += trim(ToFormattedString(&ValorCredito))+ ' CORRESPONDENTE A ALIQUOTA DE '+trim(ToFormattedString(&FilCrdIcm)) &tmpAutNfeDadAdi += '% ARTIGO 23 DA LC.123' Endif EndIF
For Each Order tmpNFeCod, tmpNfeItmCod If tmpProVlrDif <> 0 &TotalDiferido += tmpProVlrDif &TotalBaseDiferido += tmpProVlrIcm + tmpProVlrDif EndIF EndFor
&DadosDiferimento = '' If &TotalDiferido > 0 and &TotalBaseDiferido > 0 &Taxa = round(((&TotalDiferido / &TotalBaseDiferido) * 100), 2)
&DadosDiferimento = ' OPERACAO COM DIFERIMENTO' If &Taxa < 100 &DadosDiferimento += ' PARCIAL' EndIF &DadosDiferimento += ' DO IMPOSTO NO VALOR DE R$' &DadosDiferimento += trim(toFormattedString(&TotalDiferido)) + ' (' + trim(toformattedString(&Taxa)) &DadosDiferimento += '% de R$' + trim(toformattedString(&TotalBaseDiferido) ) + ')' EndIF
tmpAutNfeDadAdi = '' tmpAutNfeDadAdi = tmpAutNfeDadAdi.Trim() + ' ' + trim(&PedCliObsNfe) if &PedNum > 0 tmpAutNfeDadAdi = tmpAutNfeDadAdi.Trim() + ' ' + 'ORDEM/PEDIDO COMPRA: ' + trim(str(&PedNum)) EndIF tmpAutNfeDadAdi = tmpAutNfeDadAdi.Trim() + ' ' + trim(&PedObsNfe) tmpAutNfeDadAdi = tmpAutNfeDadAdi.Trim() + ' ' + trim(&impostoAproximado) tmpAutNfeDadAdi = tmpAutNfeDadAdi.Trim() + ' ' + trim(&DadosDiferimento) tmpAutNfeDadAdi = tmpAutNfeDadAdi.Trim() + ' ' + trim(&ObservacoesCFOP) tmpAutNfeDadAdi = tmpAutNfeDadAdi.Trim() + ' ' + trim(&tmpAutNfeDadAdi)
tmpAutNfeDadAdi = tmpAutNfeDadAdi.Trim()
tmpManNfeDadAdi = ''
EndFor
commit
sub 'tabImposto' RetornaRegimeTributarioFilial.Call(&EmpCod, &FilBasImp, &FilRegTrib, &CImpOriUfeCod) &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs = new() &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.EmpCod = &EmpCod &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpTbFilCod = &FilBasImp &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpLctCod = &LctBasImpCod &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpOriUfeCod = &CImpOriUfeCod &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpDstUfeCod = &PedCliCidUfeCod &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpGruImpCod = &PedCliGruImpCod &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpCatCod = &ImpCatCod &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpDtaIni = serverdate() &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.ProCod = &tmpProCod prcRetornaConfiguracaoImposto_IBSCBS.Call(&sdtCadastrotabelaImpostoCbs)
For Each Order EmpCod,CImpTbFilCod,CImpLctCod,CImpOriUfeCod,CImpDstUfeCod,CImpGruImpCod,CImpCatCod,(CImpDtaIni) Where EmpCod = &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.EmpCod Where CImpTbFilCod = &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpTbFilCod Where CImpLctCod = &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpLctCod Where CImpOriUfeCod = &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpOriUfeCod Where CImpDstUfeCod = &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpDstUfeCod Where CImpGruImpCod = &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpGruImpCod Where CImpCatCod = &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpCatCod Where CImpDtaIni <= &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpDtaIni
For Each Order EmpCod,CImpTbFilCod,CImpLctCod,CImpOriUfeCod,CImpDstUfeCod,CImpGruImpCod,CImpCatCod,CImpDtaIni,ObsCod if &obscod(ObsCod) = 0 &ObservacoesCFOP += ' '+ trim(ObsNom) &obscod (ObsCod) = 1 EndIf EndFor
Exit EndFor EndSub
Sub 'CalucloImpostoAproximado' &tmpProVlrApxImp = 0
If &LctTip = TipoLancamento.SaidaMercadoria &AliTaxa = RetornaTaxaNCM.UDP(&EmpCod,&FilCod,&FilCidUfeCod, &NcmCod)
If not &AliTaxa.IsEmpty() &tmpProVlrApxImp = round((&tmpPedVlrTotNov-&AuxtmpPedVlrDsc) * (&AliTaxa / 100), 2) EndIF EndIF EndSub
Sub 'CalculaRateioFrete' //FRETE &tmpProVlrFrt = 0
if &PedItmCod = &UltimoPedItmCod &tmpProVlrFrt = &tmpNfeVlrFrt - &AuxNfeProVlrFrt Else &tmpProVlrFrt = round((&tmpProBasVlrIcm * &valorGlobalFrete), 2) &AuxNfeProVlrFrt += &tmpProVlrFrt Endif
EndSub
Sub 'CalculaValorUnitarioTotal' &tmpPedVlrUntNov = &PedVlrUntDsc
if &tmpNfePerDsc <> 0 and &tmpTipDesc = 'P' //DESCONTOS EM % &tmpPedVlrDsc = round(((&tmpPedVlrUntNov * &tmpNfePerDsc) / 100), 5) Else //DESCONTO EM VALORES R$ &tmpPedVlrDsc = round(((&tmpPedVlrUntNov * &DescontoUnitarioGlobal) / 100), 5) Endif EndSub

Property.Name: Description
Property.Value: tmp Nfe Pro Bas Icms Ret
